title: Meta Quest 3 Hat
description: Adds the Meta Quest 3 helmet to the player
body:
**This small resource pack replaces the carved pumpkin with a Meta Quest 3 VR headset — perfect for VR-themed survival, roleplay, or just fun screenshots.**



📦 Features:

Replaces the carved pumpkin with a 3D model of the Meta Quest 3

Only activates when the pumpkin is renamed to Quest 3 in an anvil

Works perfectly in VR with [ViveCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/vivecraft) or QuestCraft

Great for videos, memes, or immersive tech roleplay



⚙️ Requirements:

✅ OptiFine or [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) (for custom item textures to work)  

✅ Rename a carved pumpkin to Quest 3 using an anvil  

✅ For Minecraft versions above 1.21.1, since CIT Resewn is no longer updated, you need to use the [Variants CIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit/versions) mod instead.
